derivatives: indecisive a. 犹豫不决的;非决定性的

entries.mnemonic: de(down)+termin(边界)+ation→在心里定下边界→决心

senses.example: Determination is one of the factors in a person's success.
senses.example_zh: 决心是一个人成功的要素之一。

senses.def_en: the act of finding the exact level, amount, or causes of sth.
senses.example: a determination of the ship's longitude // determination of the cause of death
senses.example_zh: 测定船只所处的经度 // 死亡原因的确定

senses.def_en: protecting oneself from criticism, exposure of one's shortcomings, etc.
senses.example: There's no need to be so defensive; I just asked how old you are!
senses.example_zh: 你不必这么大戒心,我只是问你多大年龄!

derivatives: defensible a. 可防御的;能辩护的
indefensible a. 无法防御的;无法辩护的

entries.mnemonic: de(down)+fend(打击)+ant→原告想打倒的一方→被告

senses.example: In the trial, the defendant, Hu Changqing is accused of committing bribery.
senses.example_zh: 被告人胡长清在审判中被指控犯有受贿罪。

derivatives: defender n. 保卫者;辩护人

senses.example_zh: 这工作需要有很好的体力。

senses.def_en: to cause sb. to believe sth. by the use of argument or evidence
senses.example: He finally convinced us of his innocence.
senses.example_zh: 他终于使我们相信他是清白的。

senses.def_en: to include sth. as a part
senses.example: Inventions typically involve minor improvements in technology.
senses.example_zh: 发明创造往往包括技术上的小改进。

senses.def_en: to cause sb. to become connected or concerned
senses.example: I hate to get involved in other people's quarrels.
senses.example_zh: 我讨厌参与别人的争吵。

senses.def_en: to ask or allow sb. to take part in sth.
senses.example: Try to involve as many children as possible in the game.
senses.example_zh: 尽量让多些孩子参与游戏。

derivatives: involved a. 复杂的;有关的

entries.mnemonic: con(一起)+cern(分离)→把分开的东西联系起来→关系

senses.example: a matter of the utmost concern
senses.example_zh: 关系重大的事,头等大事

senses.example: What concern is it of yours?

senses.def_en: to have to do with or relate to
senses.example: Where money is concerned, I always try to be careful.
senses.example_zh: 在有关钱的问题上,我总是尽量小心谨慎。

senses.def_en: to be of interest or importance to
senses.example: More and more people are concerning themselves with environmental problems.
senses.example_zh: 越来越多的人关心起环境问题。

senses.example: What do you know concerning this?
senses.example_zh: 关于这事你知道些什么?

senses.def_en: requiring the aid of another (~on, upon)

extras.title: 表示“说服”的动词
extras.content: convince:着重指“用事实和证据使对方信服”。persuade:着重指“通过劝说使对方同意做或不做某事”,一般不用于“使某人相信”。

extras.title: concern
extras.content: as/so far as... be concerned 就…而言 As far as I'm concerned, the whole idea is crazy. 在我看来,这一想法十分荒唐。
